summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MCP Tunnel POC with Supabase Realtime. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working as expected with graceful degradation for placeholder credentials.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns correct health status with all config flags
POST /api/mcp/clients returns 503 when DB not available (expected)
GET /api/mcp/clients returns 503 when DB not available (expected)
Frontend loads MCP Tunnel header correctly
Connection Status section displays 5 status indicators
Register MCP Client form with inputs and button functional
Status dots show correct colors (Backend green, Supabase red)
Form inputs are functional and button is clickable
No clients message displays when no clients registered
